---
title: "About Me"
about:
  template: solana
  image: images\profileimage.jpg
---

I'm a data engineer ⚙️ at the Danish Business Authority, working with data pipelines, graph databases, and scalable infrastructure to support digital innovation and intelligent control systems.

I hold a PhD degree in political science from Aarhus University (🇩🇰) where I applied computational methods to multimodal data sources, studying the behavior of political elites. My dissertation is titled [The Sounds of Politics: How Politicians Pitch Conflict, Representation, and Power](https://politica.dk/fileadmin/politica/Dokumenter/Afhandlinger/mathias_rask.pdf).

Besides work, I'm a sport enthusiast, watching cycling 🚴🏽, football 🏈, baseball ⚾, soccer ⚽, and cross-country skiing ⛷️ and enjoy developing data pipelines myself. I live in the Nordvest area of Copenhagen 📍 with my three favorite people: my wife Katrine and our two daughters Ingrid and Edith.
